## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Yana Medvedeva for Content Operations Specialist role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Yana has 8+ years of editorial/journalism experience and recent AI/LLM expertise](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [growthx.ai focuses on content workflows/pipelines, not just content generation](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Role involves using AI tools to create content while improving workflows](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Human input critical for brief creation, outline refinement, and final polish](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

## Topics

### Yana's Background and Experience

  - [8+ years as journalist/editor until 2023](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Transitioned to AI training and prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Created workflows for news structuring, research, and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Experience with various LLM models and their strengths/weaknesses](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### growthx.ai's Approach and Technology

  - [Building workflows to break down content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Focus on articulating steps that are typically done mentally by writers](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Use of custom-built pipeline tool for article generation](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Emphasis on reinforcement loops and continuous improvement of prompts/workflows](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Content Generation Challenges and Solutions

  - [Solving for article length using chunking and read-time prompts](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Addressing common LLM issues like TLDR generation and statistics placement](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Importance of human intervention in brief creation and outline refinement](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Goal of 10-15 minutes total human time per piece of content](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)

### Role of Human Editors in AI-Assisted Content Creation

  - [50% of time spent on brief creation and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [Outline review and adjustment](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
  - [Final polish and quality checks after AI generation](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [Identifying trends and suggesting workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)

### Company Culture and Approach

  - [Flat organization structure with direct feedback loop from users to engineers](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Focus on eliminating repetitive work through automation](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=2260.0)
  - [Balance between meeting client needs and producing human-readable content](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marilia to reach out with further steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
  - [Potential for follow-up discussions on specific aspects of the role and technology](https://fathom.video/share/cA4JR8SW5rX51--snpxc1qan4J6SZY32?tab=summary&timestamp=3140.0)
